title: hieracium rostanii subsp. korongyisense
intro: Hieracium rostanii subsp. korongyisense is a lesser-known subspecies of the Hieracium rostanii plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant agent. The health benefits of Hieracium rostanii subsp. korongyisense include its ability to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or infusion, although its widespread cultivation and commercial availability are limited due to its rarity and geographical distribution.
